item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 22s That's Saturday afternoon done in Sindelfingen
Springer dumps out defending champ Anders
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 22s That's Saturday afternoon done in Sindelfingen
Springer dumps out defending champ Anderson Nijman continues imperious form Comfortable wins for Rock & Bunting
What a line-up we've got to come this evening - join us at 1900 CEST (1800 BST) 1

item.title:
livedarts: Live Darts @livedarts · 4min 𝗥𝗢𝗖𝗞 𝗗𝗘𝗡𝗜𝗘𝗦 𝗗𝗬𝗡𝗔𝗠𝗜𝗧𝗘
Josh Rock takes out 128 to add to his earlier 158 checkout as he sea
item.description:
Live Darts @livedarts · 4min 𝗥𝗢𝗖𝗞 𝗗𝗘𝗡𝗜𝗘𝗦 𝗗𝗬𝗡𝗔𝗠𝗜𝗧𝗘
Josh Rock takes out 128 to add to his earlier 158 checkout as he seals a 6-3 victory over Keane Barry with a 98 average and 50% on the doubles 362

item.title: Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 4min Josh Rock has hit Keane Barry with a couple of stunning checkouts to sink the Irishman and move
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 4min Josh Rock has hit Keane Barry with a couple of stunning checkouts to sink the Irishman and move into the final day of action.
Rocky kicked off the match with a break of throw via a 158 checkout and sealed the match with a 128.
Full Afternoon Round Up
Mike De Decker 4-6 Mostrar más 34

item.title: PDCEurope: PDC Darts Europe @PDCEurope · 5min Half-time in Sindelfingen! The first eight matches of today are through! 64
item.description: PDC Darts Europe @PDCEurope · 5min Half-time in Sindelfingen! The first eight matches of today are through! 64
